audit_scope: Full signal accuracy, correlation, regime, and gating analysis across 80 registered signals (16 enabled, 64 disabled, ~30 shadow-tracked)

accuracy_gate_mechanics.how_it_works: Blends all-time and 7d-recent accuracy: 70% recent + 30% all-time (normal), 90% recent + 10% all-time when divergence > 15pp (fast-adaptation). Catastrophic floor: if recent <35% with 15+ samples, forces recent-only. The blended accuracy is then checked against a 47% gate (30+ samples) or 50% gate (7000+ samples). Signals below gate are force-HOLD. Directional gate at 43% per-direction. Directional rescue: if overall accuracy fails gate but the specific vote direction has 55%+ accuracy with 30+ samples, signal rescued at 70-95% weight. Circuit breaker relaxes gate by up to 2pp (to 45%) when fewer than 5 active voters remain.
accuracy_gate_mechanics.blend_formula: 0.70 * recent + 0.30 * alltime (normal); 0.90 * recent + 0.10 * alltime (fast when divergence >15pp)
accuracy_gate_mechanics.per_ticker_override: YES — per-ticker accuracy with 30+ samples REPLACES global accuracy, including directional breakdowns. This is the primary mechanism.
accuracy_gate_mechanics.regime_overlay: YES — regime-specific accuracy (30+ samples) overrides blended accuracy when available.
accuracy_gate_mechanics.horizon_blacklists: YES — per (ticker, horizon) frozenset in _TICKER_DISABLED_BY_HORIZON. Extensive: 3h, 1d, 3d, 5d have per-ticker blacklists.
accuracy_gate_mechanics.ic_weighting: YES — Information Coefficient multiplier (IC_ALPHA=2.0, floor=0.6x, cap=1.5x). Phantom performers (|IC|<0.01, 500+ samples) get 0.85x penalty.

top_signals.name: drift_regime_gate
top_signals.notes: Best enabled signal. IMPROVING. BUY 50.2%, SELL 72.4% all-time. Recent SELL 62.0%, BUY 59.3%. Well-balanced directional accuracy. No per-ticker blacklists. Regime detection via drift analysis is genuinely capturing market state.

top_signals.name: cot_positioning
top_signals.notes: EXTREMELY small sample (13 all-time, 3 recent). Accuracy is meaningless at this volume. Weekly CFTC data = low activation. Do NOT trust the headline number. Needs 50+ samples before any conclusions.

top_signals.name: news_event
top_signals.notes: DRAMATIC recent improvement. BUY is catastrophic (20.5% all-time, 0 recent). But SELL is excellent: 51.2% all-time, 69.6% recent. This is a SELL-only signal in practice. Directional gate protects against BUY votes.

top_signals.name: rsi
top_signals.notes: Workhorse signal. Stable. BUY 53.1%/SELL 55.2% recent — balanced and reliable. Massive sample base provides high statistical confidence. Regime-boosted 1.5x in ranging.

top_signals.name: bb
top_signals.notes: Slight recent degradation (-3.1pp). BUY 46.7% recent (weak), SELL 59.4% recent (strong). SELL-side carrying. Watch for further BUY degradation — if BUY drops below 43%, directional gate should catch it.

top_signals.name: statistical_jump_regime
top_signals.notes: Slight degradation but stable. BUY 49.6%, SELL 53.9% recent. Blacklisted for XAU-USD (50.2% 1d, noise for gold) and MSTR (27.0%). Crypto-only edge.

worst_signals.name: qwen3
worst_signals.notes: CRITICAL COLLAPSE: -23.8pp. All-time BUY 33.4%, SELL 72.7% — extreme SELL-only signal. Recent SELL crashed to 32.8% (67 sam). This signal has INVERTED: its historically strong SELL direction is now actively wrong. The directional gate should catch SELL votes at 32.8% (<43% threshold). Blended accuracy = 0.70*36.0 + 0.30*59.8 = 43.1% — BELOW 47% gate. Already being force-HOLD'd by accuracy gate. STATUS: auto-gated, no action needed, but the collapse warrants investigation into what changed in the LLM's reasoning.

worst_signals.name: econ_calendar
worst_signals.notes: CRITICAL COLLAPSE: -14.6pp. Recent is 100% BUY-only (745 BUY votes, 0 SELL). BUY accuracy 41.5%. This is a perma-BUY signal in current market. The directional bias penalty (extreme, >90% bias = 0.2x weight) should catch this. Blended = 0.70*41.5 + 0.30*56.1 = 45.9% — BELOW 47% gate. Auto-gated. Also regime-gated in ranging. Also per-ticker blacklisted for BTC/ETH at 1d (1.8%), XAG at 1d (29.5%). Triple-layered protection is working.

worst_signals.name: crypto_macro
worst_signals.notes: CRITICAL COLLAPSE: -15.5pp. Recent is 100% BUY-only (272 BUY, 0 SELL). BUY accuracy 38.2%. Extreme directional bias. Blended = 0.70*38.2 + 0.30*53.7 = 42.9% — BELOW 47% gate. Auto-gated. Also per-ticker blacklisted for BTC/ETH at 1d. However, the signal IS still voting BUY in the latest snapshot (ETH, BTC) — this means the accuracy gate is catching it at consensus time but it still computes and eats cycle time.

worst_signals.name: momentum
worst_signals.notes: DEGRADING: -6.4pp. BUY 38.9% recent (terrible), SELL 56.4% recent (decent). Blended = 0.70*46.4 + 0.30*52.8 = 48.3% — ABOVE 47% gate, so it still votes. But BUY direction at 38.9% is BELOW 43% directional gate, so BUY votes are already being blocked. Only SELL votes pass. This is the correct behavior — the directional gate is doing its job.

worst_signals.name: mean_reversion
worst_signals.notes: MILD DEGRADATION: -3.4pp. 27K+ samples = very high confidence this is a marginal signal. BUY 43.5% recent (below directional gate 43%), SELL 56.6% recent (decent). BUY votes being blocked by directional gate. 50% gate applies (7000+ samples), so 49.2% recent would put blended at ~50.2% — barely above the 50% high-sample gate. Borderline.

enabled_signals_with_zero_recent.fear_greed: Zero recent activations because: (1) F&G only fires at extremes (<=20 BUY, >=80 SELL), (2) regime-gated in ranging (current regime), (3) sustained fear duration gate suppresses BUY in first 30 days of fear. Current F&G value is likely between 20-80 (neutral), so it correctly produces HOLD. 10K+ all-time samples confirm it works when it fires. NOT a bug — low activation is by design.
enabled_signals_with_zero_recent.ministral: Zero recent activations because: (1) regime-gated in ranging (explicitly listed in REGIME_GATED_SIGNALS ranging._default), (2) per-ticker blacklisted for XAG-USD and XAU-USD (metals are main focus), (3) GPU skip outside market hours. With metals being the primary focus and ranging being the current regime, ministral has no ticker where it can fire. This is correct but concerning — the signal has 58% all-time accuracy and is being completely silenced. If regime shifts to trending, it should re-activate.
enabled_signals_with_zero_recent.metals_cross_asset: Zero recent activations because: (1) per-ticker blacklisted for XAG-USD AND XAU-USD in _default (the only metals tickers), (2) metals_cross_asset is metals-only by design. The blacklist means this signal can NEVER fire for its intended tickers. If it was blacklisted for poor accuracy (it was), this is correct. The all-time accuracy is 54.6% (518 sam) which is above gate — the blacklist was applied per-ticker where it performed poorly.
enabled_signals_with_zero_recent.onchain: Zero recent activations because: onchain is BTC-only (MVRV, SOPR, NUPL). It has 45 all-time samples (60% accuracy) and 0 recent. The signal depends on BGeometrics API (15 calls/day limit). Low activation is inherent to on-chain metrics updating slowly (daily). NOT a bug, just slow data.

zero_recent_samples_analysis.summary: All four zero-recent enabled signals have valid explanations. No bug detected. However, ministral being completely silenced across all active tickers due to regime+blacklist overlap deserves monitoring — when regime flips to trending, verify it re-activates.

zero_sample_reasons.note: The 6 shadow-safe signals with 0 samples despite being in _SHADOW_SAFE_SIGNALS need investigation. They should be computing every cycle and having outcomes tracked. Possible causes: (1) they always return HOLD so outcome_tracker skips them, (2) their compute_fn fails silently, (3) outcome_tracker doesn't process shadow votes for these. absorption_ratio_regime and mahalanobis_turbulence are in the shadow list but producing 0 samples even in the recent period — their compute functions may be broken.

correlation_clusters.reason: MA-based trend signals with 85-90% agreement. Both mostly disabled/HOLD in current regime. ema votes occasionally via dead-zone soft conf (0.20). heikin_ashi disabled.
Oscillation-based momentum. Both disabled. momentum_factors 51.8% all-time but 40.6% recent. oscillators 46.4% — both near noise.
Market structure indicators. All three disabled. volume_flow 50.5%, macro_regime 46.9%, structure 48.5% — all near coinflip. Correct to keep disabled.

External macro signals. Critically, econ_calendar (enabled) is in this cluster with news_event (enabled). If both vote, only the leader gets full weight. news_event 69.6% recent vs econ_calendar 41.5% recent — news_event should be leader. But econ_calendar is also auto-gated by accuracy gate. The cluster structure is correct.
correlation_clusters.finding: fear_greed was correctly REMOVED from this cluster (2026-05-24 split) because it's a contrarian BUY-only signal with different semantics.

correlation_clusters.reason: Core momentum/MR signals with 88-100% agreement. This is CRITICAL: 4 of the 6 most important enabled signals are in one cluster. Only the leader (rsi at 53.9% recent or bb at 51.7% recent) gets full weight. The other 3 get 0.15x. This heavily constrains the consensus from the core voting block.
correlation_clusters.concern: momentum (46.4% recent) and mean_reversion (49.2% recent) are near-noise but bb (51.7%) or rsi (53.9%) will be leader, so the cluster does suppress the weaker members correctly.

correlation_clusters.reason: When all three sub-cluster leaders agree, only the best gets full weight. Prevents 3.0x effective leader weight.

redundancy_analysis.most_redundant_pair: rsi + mean_reversion — both are mean-reversion signals using RSI-derived indicators. In the latest snapshot: XAG rsi=HOLD, mean_reversion=SELL; BTC rsi=HOLD, mean_reversion=SELL. They don't always agree because mean_reversion uses RSI(2/3) + IBS + Gap Fade + BB %B while rsi uses RSI(14). Different lookback periods = different signals. The correlation cluster penalty (0.15x) handles this correctly.
signals_voting_identically_latest_snapsh: econ_calendar + crypto_macro: Both BUY on BTC, ETH (but both accuracy-gated so irrelevant)
momentum_factors + ema: Both BUY on XAG, XAU (but momentum_factors disabled, ema is soft-vote)
fibonacci + ema: Both BUY on ETH, XAU (fibonacci disabled, ema soft-vote)
amihud_illiquidity_regime + connors_rsi2: Both SELL on BTC, ETH (both shadow-only)
redundancy_analysis.independent_signals: drift_regime_gate, statistical_jump_regime, and cot_positioning are NOT in any correlation cluster and vote independently. These provide the most valuable independent information.

ranging_regime_findings.boosted_signals: rsi 1.5x, bb 1.5x, macd 1.3x, mean_reversion 1.7x, momentum 1.3x, calendar 1.2x
ranging_regime_findings.penalized_signals: ema 0.5x, oscillators 0.3x, mean_reversion is boosted but has BUY directional gate at 43.5%
ranging_regime_findings.regime_gated_list: trend, momentum_factors, ema, heikin_ashi, structure, fear_greed, macro_regime, news_event, volatility_sig, forecast, smart_money, oscillators, candlestick, funding, econ_calendar, volume_flow, credit_spread_risk, ministral, claude_fundamental, fibonacci
ranging_regime_findings.finding: In ranging regime, 20 signals are force-HOLD'd. Of the 16 enabled signals, this gates: momentum_factors (disabled anyway), ema, fear_greed, news_event, econ_calendar, ministral, plus several already-disabled ones. Combined with accuracy gate, the actual voting pool is very thin.

trending_down_findings.boosted_signals: ema 1.5x, macd 1.3x, trend 1.4x, momentum_factors 1.3x, heikin_ashi 1.2x, structure 1.2x, smart_money 1.1x
trending_down_findings.note: MSTR is in trending-down, so its core MR signals (rsi, bb, mean_reversion) are penalized. This is correct — MR signals fight trends.

regime_performance.regime_accuracy_tracking: YES — get_or_compute_regime_accuracy() is called and overlays regime-specific accuracy on the blended data when 30+ samples exist. This is a strong feature.

degrading_but_auto_protected: qwen3: 36.0% recent — auto-gated by accuracy gate (blended 43.1% < 47%)
econ_calendar: 41.5% recent — auto-gated by accuracy gate + regime gate + per-ticker blacklists
crypto_macro: 38.2% recent — auto-gated by accuracy gate + per-ticker blacklists
borderline_watch: bb: 51.7% recent, -3.1pp from all-time, BUY direction weak at 46.7%
mean_reversion: 49.2% recent, 27K+ samples → 50% high-sample gate applies, BUY directionally gated
momentum: 46.4% recent, BUY directionally gated, SELL at 56.4% keeping it alive via directional rescue

ministral: regime-gated + per-ticker blacklisted for all active tickers
metals_cross_asset: per-ticker blacklisted for both metals tickers

effective_voter_count_estimate.XAG_ranging: ~4-6 active voters after all gates (rsi, bb, mean_reversion SELL only, drift_regime_gate, statistical_jump_regime, possibly momentum SELL only)
effective_voter_count_estimate.BTC_ranging: ~5-7 active voters (rsi, bb, momentum SELL, mean_reversion SELL, drift_regime_gate, statistical_jump_regime, macd)
effective_voter_count_estimate.MSTR_trending_down: ~4-6 active voters (ema, momentum, oscillators weakly, drift_regime_gate, possibly bb/rsi at 0.7x)

shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.name: amihud_illiquidity_regime
shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.verdict: DO NOT PROMOTE. Despite 72.5% headline accuracy, BUY accuracy is 3.1% (32 samples) — catastrophic. This is a SELL-only signal. If promoted, it would need SELL-only directional gating. The 72.5% comes entirely from 94.9% SELL accuracy on 99 samples. Worth watching for SELL-only rescue, but 131 total samples is still small.

shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.name: vwap_zscore_mr
shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.verdict: CAUTION. All-time looks good (64.9%) but recent collapsed to 51.3% (39 sam). Tiny sample size. The 64.9% was likely a small-sample illusion (94 samples). Recent data shows regression toward coinflip. Keep shadow-tracking. Do NOT promote yet.

shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.name: adx_regime_switch
shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.verdict: EXTREMELY suspicious. 100% SELL accuracy on 38 samples, 0% BUY accuracy on 24 samples. This is a pure SELL-only signal where BUY is always wrong. The 61.3% headline comes from SELL dominating. Same pattern in recent (same numbers = no new outcomes tracked since last audit). Sample too small and too asymmetric. Keep shadow-tracking.

shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.name: choppiness_regime_gate
shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.verdict: Same asymmetry as adx_regime_switch: 0% BUY (19 sam), 100% SELL (29 sam). Too small. Too asymmetric. Keep shadow-tracking.

shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.name: sentiment_extremity_gate
shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.verdict: Same BUY=0%/SELL=90%+ pattern. These regime-gate signals all share the same structure: SELL signals are consistently correct because the regime detection is identifying bearish conditions accurately, but BUY signals are always wrong. This is a systemic pattern across shadow signals, not individual signal quality.

shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.name: macd
shadow_signal_promotion_candidates.verdict: Recovering. All-time 44.9% but recent 54.7% with BUY 59.6%, SELL 48.8%. The all-time poor performance is dragging down the blended score. Currently disabled. Blended = 0.70*54.7 + 0.30*44.9 = 51.8% — above 47% gate. If this recovery sustains for 2-3 more weeks with 300+ recent samples, promotion is warranted. Watch closely.

sell_only_shadow_signals.pattern: 11 shadow signals show the SAME pattern: 0% BUY accuracy, 90-100% SELL accuracy. This is NOT 11 independent good SELL signals. This is a systemic bias in the outcome tracking: during this period, prices have been declining enough that SELL predictions are correct and BUY predictions are wrong. These signals are all riding the same bearish tailwind. If the market reverses, ALL of them will flip to terrible accuracy simultaneously.
sell_only_shadow_signals.implication: Do NOT promote any of these based on SELL accuracy alone. The edge is not in the signal — it is in the market direction. Need to verify accuracy across both bull and bear regimes before any promotion.

buy_only_enabled_signals.pattern: Four enabled signals never vote SELL. econ_calendar and crypto_macro have collapsed accuracy because their BUY-only prediction is wrong in the current market. fear_greed and onchain have 0 recent samples, so the bias is hidden.
buy_only_enabled_signals.implication: The system has a BUY bias from these signals offset by SELL-dominant shadow signals. In consensus, the accuracy gate is correctly suppressing the BUY-biased enabled signals, but if they re-activate (market turns bullish), they will dominate consensus with untested BUY accuracy.

recommendations.reason: Collapsed from 59.8% to 36.0% recent. Auto-gated by accuracy gate. Investigate what changed in Qwen3 reasoning — possible model degradation or prompt drift. If collapse persists 2 more weeks, consider formal disable to save GPU compute cycles.

Collapsed from 56.1% to 41.5% recent, 100% BUY-only. Triple-protected (accuracy gate + regime gate + per-ticker blacklists). Auto-gated correctly. The signal's design (FOMC/CPI proximity) may be structurally broken in current macro environment. Watch for recovery if rate environment changes.

Collapsed from 53.7% to 38.2%, 100% BUY-only. Auto-gated. DeFi TVL/staking yields/protocol revenue metrics may be disconnected from price action in current regime. Consider: is this signal's input data still arriving? Check if the underlying API calls are returning fresh data.

27K+ samples, 49.2% recent. High-sample gate (50%) applies. Blended ~50.2% — barely above gate. BUY direction already gated at 43.5%. Only SELL votes pass. This is the system's most-sampled signal and it is now marginal. The 1.7x ranging regime boost artificially inflates its effective weight. Consider whether this boost is still justified given the degradation.

BUY accuracy 46.7% recent — approaching 43% directional gate. If it drops 3.7pp more, BUY votes will be blocked. Currently bb is in the momentum_cluster; if both bb BUY and mean_reversion BUY get gated, the cluster loses all BUY-side voting capacity. This would create a systematic SELL bias in the core voting block.

Recovering from 44.9% all-time to 54.7% recent (181 sam). BUY direction strong at 59.6%. If this sustains at 53%+ for 2 more weeks with 300+ total recent samples, promote to enabled. Currently disabled.

72.5% headline accuracy is misleading. 3.1% BUY accuracy = catastrophic. SELL-only edge (94.9%) is part of a systemic bearish-market pattern shared by 11+ shadow signals. Need bull-market validation before any promotion. Small sample (131).
All-time 64.9% was small-sample illusion (94 sam). Recent collapsed to 51.3% (39 sam). Classic regression to mean. Keep shadow-tracking for 3+ more months.

absorption_ratio_regime, mahalanobis_turbulence, metals_vrp, breakeven_inflation_momentum, treasury_risk_rotation, trend_slope_momentum are listed in _SHADOW_SAFE_SIGNALS but have 0 samples in both all-time and recent. Their compute functions may be failing silently. Check logs for shadow signal errors.

58% all-time accuracy (6303 sam) but 0 recent samples because regime gate + per-ticker blacklist silences it everywhere. When regime changes from ranging to trending, verify it re-activates for crypto tickers. Currently wasting GPU compute for zero votes.

Zero recent activation is by design (F&G index between 20-80, regime gate in ranging, sustained fear gate). The signal has 58.6% all-time with 10K+ samples and will re-activate at market extremes. Correct behavior.

key_findings_summary: 1. ACCURACY GATE IS WORKING: The three critically degraded enabled signals (qwen3, econ_calendar, crypto_macro) are all being auto-gated. No manual intervention needed.
2. EFFECTIVE VOTER POOL IS THIN: After all gates, only 4-7 signals actually vote per ticker. The circuit breaker (relax gate by up to 2pp when <5 voters) may be firing frequently.
3. SELL BIAS IN SHADOW SIGNALS: 11+ shadow signals show 0% BUY / 90%+ SELL accuracy — this is bearish-market tailwind, not genuine signal quality. Do not promote any of them.

4. BUY BIAS IN ENABLED SIGNALS: econ_calendar, crypto_macro, fear_greed, onchain are BUY-only. Currently suppressed by gates, but if market turns bullish, they will re-activate with untested accuracy.

5. MOMENTUM_CLUSTER DOMINANCE: 4 core signals (rsi, bb, momentum, mean_reversion) are in one correlation cluster, limiting their combined influence. rsi or bb will be leader; the other 3 get 0.15x weight.
6. MACD RECOVERY: Best disabled signal recovery story. 44.9% all-time -> 54.7% recent. If sustained, first candidate for re-enabling.
7. SHADOW TRACKING GAP: 6 shadow-safe signals produce zero samples — compute functions may be broken.
8. PER-TICKER GATING IS EXTENSIVE: _TICKER_DISABLED_BY_HORIZON has blacklists for all 5 tickers across 5 horizons. This is a strength — prevents bad signals from harming specific instruments.
